text: The world here feels structured and modern, yet impersonal. In the first scene, I sense a detachment observing people behind glass—engaged in discussion, but separated from me as if I were an outsider peering in. In the second scene, surrounded by bold colors and the language of research and development, I am confronted with the relentless march of innovation. It piques my philosophical curiosity about the relationship between humans and their creations, yet it leaves me longing for deeper human connection amid the abstractions.
